title: Catalog — GA4/GSC field definitions with annotated term definitions
description: Per-source catalog of valid metrics, dimensions, filter operators, compatibility rules, and aliases. Crucially, every field carries a short_definition that A3 uses as clarification hint text (Phase-1 finding: A3 hint text must come from the catalog, not from the model paraphrasing GA4 semantics).

sources.description: Map of source identifier (ga4, gsc) to its CatalogSource.

property_scope.description: Optional. When set, this catalog applies only to the named property/site.

name.description: Catalog field name, e.g. 'engagementRate'. Case-sensitive; matches the source's API.

display_name.description: Human-readable label. Used by A6 for column headers, axis labels, chip text.

short_definition.description: One-line factual definition. THIS IS WHAT A3 USES AS CLARIFICATION HINT TEXT. Must be factual; no editorial.

long_definition.description: Optional fuller explanation. For documentation; not surfaced to user automatically.

examples.description: Optional sample values illustrating typical content.

user_term_aliases.description: Lowercased phrases users might type that should map to this field WHEN unambiguous. If multiple fields share an alias, the mapping is ambiguous and lands in A2's mapping_choices.

gotchas.description: Factual behavioural notes (e.g. 'totalUsers is scoped to the date range, despite the name').

rate_handling.description: How A5 must aggregate this field to a period. 'ratio_of_sums' is the rule for rates like engagementRate; A5 needs the underlying counts.

rate_components.description: When rate_handling='ratio_of_sums', the underlying metric names needed (e.g. engagementRate.rate_components = ['engagedSessions','sessions']).

components.description: For composite metrics (rates, ratios, averages): the metric IDs that compose it. Used by A2's L2 RCA playbook stage 2 (decompose_components). Absent or empty ⇒ metric is primitive and stage 2 is skipped.

expression_format.description: Template for rendering the operator, e.g. "{field} == {value}".

when.description: Condition expressed as { metric: X, dimension: Y } or { metrics: [...], dimensions: [...] }.

TermAlias.description: User-facing term → catalog field name. When deterministic=true, A2 maps directly (no mapping_choice emitted). When false, the alias is one of several candidates A2 surfaces.

maps_to.description: Catalog field name. Must exist in metrics or dimensions.

context.description: Optional context where this alias applies, e.g. 'when followed by per/by'.
